summary: Bassy, unbalanced soundboard recording marred by a disorganized show, though the playful Memphis Blues jam offers a brief highlight.
review: The recording suffers from a heavy‑bass, uneven mix that makes the soundboard feel shoddy and poorly balanced. The performance itself is described as disorganized, with only the loose Dylan‑style romp through Memphis Blues providing any real enjoyment. Overall the tape is more frustrating than rewarding.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, rating 2 stars, points to poor recording quality and a disorganized performance; no positive counter‑points.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Bass-heavy and unbalanced mix; described as shoddy and low fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Review notes a disorganized, loosely structured performance overall.
